citation: IRC §163(h)(3) + IRS Pub 936 Table 1 — pre-2017 grandfathered single/MFJ/HoH cap
comment: Hand-calc: filing_status=single, has_grandfathered_debt=True (acquisition debt incurred on or before 2017-12-15) -> grandfathered cap = $1,000,000. This is the pre-TCJA cap, preserved for borrowers who took out their loan before TCJA.
